title: $hide
text: $hide Return or set the display status of a menu item. $hide $hide = Expression set | reset $hide Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $hide Value Meaning 0 Menu item is displayed. 1 Menu item is hidden and the menu accelerator for the item is disabled. Use Use only in the preDisplay trigger of Menu objects. Description The function $hide controls whether the current menu item is displayed. Related Links $check Return or set the checked status of a menu item. $disable Disables a menu item in a menu object. reset Reset the value of the specified ProcScript function to 0. set Set the value of the specified ProcScript function to 1 (TRUE). trigger preDisplay System trigger that is executed before a menu or menu item is displayed.
